summary: Iteration 37: Tip propagation feature FULLY VERIFIED. Tips now correctly appear in BOTH 'Shift vs Operations' KPIs ($157) AND 'Staff Earnings / Cost Breakdown' section (Carlos Silva: $93.82). Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend UI: All sections verified.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, span cannot be a child of select' - minor React hydration warning from iteration 36

tip_propagation_backend.description: bartender_id correctly passed through: Bar add_item → session meta → close_tab → record_tip → tip_distribution
tip_propagation_backend.evidence: Test 10: Tip $5.40 recorded with distribution showing bartender b5f31a05... at 100%

tips_in_shift_overview.description: Shift vs Operations KPI shows Tips: $157

tips_in_staff_earnings.evidence: Carlos Silva: Tips $93.82, Ana Perez: Tips $7.92, etc. All staff have non-zero tips.

tips_consistency_both_sections.description: Staff Earnings total ($157) matches Shift Overview tips ($157)

guest_tab_detail_shows_tip.description: GET /api/tap/session/{id} returns items, total, tip_amount, tip_percent, tip_recorded
guest_tab_detail_shows_tip.evidence: Test 14: Session shows items (2), total ($17), tip_amount ($3.06), tip_percent (18%), tip_recorded=True

seed_data_creation: Multiple test tabs created during tip propagation testing: TIP_TEST_Guest, TIP_FLOW_TEST, CLOSE_TAB_TEST, TIP_RECORD_TEST, DETAIL_TIP_TEST
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37: Tip propagation feature fully validated. Tips now correctly flow from Bar frontend (bartender_id selection) → stored in session meta → used in record_tip for tip_distribution → matched by _calc_staff_cost to attribute tips to individual barmen. Both Shift Overview KPIs ($157 Tips) and Staff Earnings section (Carlos Silva $93.82 tips) show correct values. Bar page shows all 7 guests in Inside Tabs.
